Here's what needs to change, ranked by priority: --- ## Security Gaps: inventory-uploader vs xa-uploader ### Critical **1.
Session revocation (completely absent)** xa-uploader uses a KV-backed minimum-issued-at timestamp — you can invalidate all active sessions instantly.
Security headers missing** xa-uploader sets CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy in middleware.

Env var needed ``` DATABASE_URL=postgresql://user:pass@host:5432/dbname ``` Currently missing from your `apps/inventory-uploader/.env.local` — add it there pointing at your local Postgres.

Standard Prisma with a `postgresql://` connection string **will not work in a Cloudflare Worker** — Workers run in a V8 isolate, not Node.js, so TCP socket connections (which Prisma uses) are blocked.
